decision: Replace RUNE crack with Goldberg Emulator for HumanitZ
reason: RUNE steam_api64.dll fails under Wine with 'Not found 0x01 ini' error, Goldberg is open-source and Wine-compatible

decision: Switch Hermes provider from openrouter to openai-api (Fireworks)
reason: OpenRouter key exhausted (401 Unauthorized), Fireworks key is active with Kimi K2.6 access

decision: Create clean workspace structure per HUP-00A
reason: Upstream core lives in ~/.hermes/hermes-agent, need clean separation for custom work

decision: Enable hard-stop enforcement via existing ToolCallGuardrailController
reason: Hermes already ships with full guardrail system in agent/tool_guardrails.py; only config toggle was off. Enabling prevents infinite tool loops without upstream patches.
alternatives: Use plugin hook to intercept tool calls

decision: Implement progress_detector as a plugin instead of upstream patch
reason: post_tool_call + pre_llm_call hooks provide enough surface to detect cross-tool carousel patterns without modifying core. Keeps workspace clean and survives upstream updates.

decision: Declare Hermes Desktop not feasible on this system
reason: Electron renders black screen due to GPU/driver incompatibility. CLI mode and Telegram gateway are confirmed working and cover all use cases. Desktop was P3 (nice-to-have) and should not block HUP pipeline.

Initial false negative caused by testing with --disable-gpu (crashes renderer) and using xdotool which cannot detect Wayland windows. Actual working launch: hermes-desktop --no-sandbox --ozone-platform=wayland. Desktop window opens and renders correctly.

decision: Patch 3 config write paths to respect _config_lock
reason: HUP-01 requires blocking config writes when _config_lock is true. Added _is_config_locked() to tui_gateway/server.py:_save_cfg, _write_config_key, hermes_cli/config.py:save_config, cli.py:save_config_value. All 3 tests pass.
alternatives: Add lock to YAML loader level

reason: HUP-02 requires proving subprocesses inherit HERMES_HOME. Existing _inject_context_hermes_home() in tools/environments/local.py already propagates. Tests confirm both direct env inheritance and ContextVar override work.
alternatives: Patch delegate_tool.py to explicitly pass HERMES_HOME
Add wrapper script around every subprocess spawn

decision: Create PR quality gate checklist and template
reason: HUP-19 requires concrete PR review criteria to prevent scope creep, secret leaks, and control layer weakening. Created inspector checklist and PR template in workspace.
alternatives: Add CI gates without manual review

reason: Created automated tests for hard-stop, no-bypass, and secret-redaction. Documented 6 manual exams with pass/fail criteria. Tests: 3/3 pass.
These HUPs are documentation/protocol only — no upstream core patches needed. Creating them in batch maximizes throughput.
alternatives: Implement each with full code changes
Skip docs, rely on tribal knowledge
